outline.title: Deliverance Ministry
outline.summary: Welcome to Deliverance Ministry. This course explores the biblical foundation and practical application of deliverance ministry - the process of setting people free from demonic oppression and spiritual bondage through the authority and power of Jesus Christ.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Overview
outline.summary: Understand the biblical basis for deliverance ministry, recognize signs of demonic oppression, and learn proven techniques for ministering freedom to those in bondage. This course equips believers with knowledge and spiritual authority to effectively minister deliverance.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: What You'll Learn
outline.summary: Identify demonic oppression and its manifestations. Understand spiritual authority and how to exercise it. Learn deliverance protocols and techniques. Develop discernment and spiritual sensitivity. Apply deliverance ministry in various contexts.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: 10 comprehensive lessons covering biblical foundations, spiritual warfare, recognizing demonic activity, deliverance protocols, prayer and intercession, authority in Christ, and practical case studies. Includes interactive discussions and real-world applications.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Ready to Begin?
outline.summary: Enroll now and equip yourself with the knowledge and spiritual authority to minister deliverance to those in bondage. Transform lives through the power of Jesus Christ and become an effective instrument of God's freedom and healing.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
